description_long: This coupe car features a striking galaxy-themed paint job, blending deep purples, blues, and pinks with star-like speckles across its entire body. The car is equipped with a large rear spoiler, low-profile tires with matching purple rims, and a streamlined, sporty silhouette. The front end displays a distinctive grille and aggressive headlights, while the rear showcases dual exhausts and a sculpted bumper. The windows are tinted, and the car has two doors, typical of a performance-oriented coupe. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle, likely inspired by racing or tuner culture. The materials appear to be primarily metal and glass, with rubber tires and plastic trim elements.
description: A galaxy-themed, two-door coupe car with a large rear spoiler, purple rims, and a sporty, streamlined body. The car features tinted windows, aggressive front and rear styling, and a vibrant, cosmic paint finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the galaxy paint, purple rims, large rear spoiler, and two-door coupe profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the aggressive grille, headlights, and the cosmic pattern on the hood.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the two-door layout, purple wheels, and the full length of the spoiler.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large spoiler, dual exhausts, sculpted bumper, and the continuation of the galaxy paint.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
